name: Menu for Medieval Christmas Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 roast Merrie Crown Roast of Pork
1 fruit wreath Lady Apple Fruit Wreath
1 sauce Cran-Brandy Pudding & Golden Toffee Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Old English Sherry Cheese by combining with Carrots & Grapes Vermouth.
2. Cook the Herbed Green Beans and serve alongside the cheese mixture.
3. Roast the Merrie Crown Roast of Pork until fully cooked.
4. Make the Savory Rice Stuffing and arrange it in a serving dish.
5. Slice the Lady Apple Fruit Wreath and place on top of the stuffing.
6. Serve the Cran-Brandy Pudding & Golden Toffee Sauce with the pork roast.
7. Place the Duchesses Potato Puffs on the side for garnish.
8. Enjoy your Medieval Christmas Dinner!
